ham.subject: Transaction Alert: Recent Purchase at XYZ Store
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

This is a confirmation that a purchase was made on your account ending in 4242. The transaction details are as follows:

- Merchant: XYZ Store
- Date & Time: 2026-04-06 14:32:07
- Amount: $127.45
- Location: 123 Commerce Blvd, Springfield, IL

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is required. If you do not recognize this purchase, please click the link below to review and report any unauthorized activity immediately.

<URL>

Thank you for banking with us.

Sincerely,

Customer Support Team
Acme Bank

spam.subject: URGENT: CEO Request for Gift Card Purchase
spam.body:
Dear Finance Team,

I hope you are well. I need your assistance with an urgent matter. Our company has been presented with a time‑critical opportunity that requires the procurement of a gift card for a key vendor. The vendor has requested the gift card to be sent within the next 24 hours in order to secure a favorable contract.

Please process the purchase of a $500 Amazon gift card and transfer the funds to the following account:

- Account Name: Global Vendor Services
- Bank: First National
- Routing Number: 123456789
- Account Number: 987654321

I will provide the necessary confirmation once the transaction is completed. Your prompt action is critical to maintaining our strong partnership.

Thank you for your immediate attention to this matter.

Best regards,

John Doe
Chief Executive Officer
Acme Corporation
